metadata.description: vault-os: Opinionated Claude Code + Obsidian knowledge companion by saixso

plugins.name: vault-os
plugins.description: Opinionated Claude Code + Obsidian knowledge companion. Persistent, compounding wiki vault with harness and hooks. Optional DragonScale Memory extension adds hierarchical log folds, deterministic page addresses, embedding-based semantic tiling lint, and boundary-first autoresearch topic selection. Fork of claude-obsidian by AgriciDaniel.
